resources.string: Choose your preferred language and voice settings
• AI-powered crop disease detection from photos
• Real-time accurate weather forecasts for your area
• Expert agricultural advice via voice and text
For any queries, reach out to us:
How do I detect crop diseases using the app?
Go to the Home screen and click on \'Disease Detection\'. Point your camera at the affected crop part and take a photo. Our AI will analyze it and provide a diagnosis.
How accurate is the AI advice?
Our AI is trained on extensive agricultural datasets. While highly accurate, we recommend consulting with a local agricultural expert for critical decisions.
Can I use the app in my local language?
Yes, KisanCare AI supports multiple regional languages. You can change your language preference from the \'Settings\' menu.
Does the weather forecast work offline?
You need an active internet connection to get real-time weather updates. However, your last viewed forecast may be available for offline viewing.
How do I use Voice Query?
Simply tap the \'Voice Query\' button on the home screen and speak your question. The app will transcribe your voice and provide an AI response.
Yes, we take data privacy seriously. Your profile and query history are stored securely and are not shared with third parties without your consent.
How can I save useful agricultural advice?
When you receive a response to a query, you can tap the \'Save\' icon to add it to your \'Saved Advice\' section for easy access later.
What should I do if the app crashes?
Please ensure you are using the latest version of the app. If the issue persists, you can reach out to our support team via email or phone provided above.
These tips are generated daily based on your farm location, crops, and current season.
Add organic compost to your soil before monsoon arrives. This improves water retention and nutrient availability.
Monitor for boll worm infestation. Use pheromone traps and maintain field hygiene to prevent pest buildup.
Water crops early morning or late evening to minimize evaporation losses. Use drip irrigation for better efficiency.
Apply fertilizers based on soil test results. Over-application can harm soil health and waste money.
Check local weather before harvesting. Ensure dry conditions for at least 3 days to prevent crop spoilage.
Use neem cake or vermicompost to enrich soil naturally and improve its long-term fertility.
Rotate crops to break pest cycles and replenish soil nutrients. Avoid planting the same crop twice in a row.
Use biological controls and pheromone traps before resorting to chemical pesticides for a safer harvest.
Store grains in a cool, dry place. Ensure moisture content is below 12% to prevent mold and insect attacks.
Mulch your fields to retain soil moisture. This reduces watering frequency and keeps roots cool in summer.
Tips are updated daily at 6:00 AM
Your feedback helps us improve our AI recommendations and app experience
How would you rate your experience?
Share your thoughts, suggestions, or report issues
Your feedback helps us improve KisanCare AI
Please turn on location to get accurate weather and local farm advice.
Our AI will provide personalized advice based on your farm details and current conditions.
How to control aphids in cotton?
Note: These recommendations are AI-generated based on general agricultural practices. For critical decisions, please consult with local agricultural experts or extension officers.
Please upload a clearly visible photo of your plant for detailed disease analysis.
Choose which notifications you want to receive
Receive alerts for extreme weather conditions
Receive personalized farming tips every day
Note: Critical weather alerts will always be delivered regardless of your settings to ensure your safety and crop protection.
Control how the app uses your data and device features
For disease detection and image uploads
Note: Your data is stored securely and never shared with third parties without your explicit consent.
Do you want to logout? Please confirm.
